$comment: Maps core INHERIT enum values to local terminology per jurisdiction. UIs should use this to display jurisdiction-appropriate labels.
title: Local Term Mappings
description: Bidirectional mappings between INHERIT core enum values and jurisdiction-specific terminology. Enables UIs to display familiar local terms while maintaining interoperable core values.

CA.label: Certificate of Appointment of Estate Trustee with a Will
Certificate of Appointment of Estate Trustee without a Will
